Step 1: use a soft brush to create a basic ribbon shape. Aurora's weave across the sky like a river.

Step 2: using a soft eraser, shrink the size down and in an up and down motion you're going to softly create uneven rays. You can go in and add more color as needed.

Step 3: Aurora's are full of color. Lock this layer and add in whatever variation of color you want. It needs to create a smooth gradient.

Step 4: Duplicate the later! Set both to a glow dodge or similar layer effect. My bottom layer here is set to 85% while my top layer is set to 74%. The opacity will vary depending on background and how bright you want it.

images.alt: an artwork of a scene happening within a forest clearing. a frail elven woman stopping mid step, gazing at the object on the left from the camera with curiosity and awe. she's carrying a basket of herbs and holding a purple fruit, partially eaten. her dress is very dirty, frayed at the edges. from the left, curling around her loosly is the end of a dragon tail, chipped and damaged, with blood splatters and impacted sword and arrows.

bust portrait of an original character (oc) from guild wars 2. she's a white-haired woman with little black horns. her bangs flow on the side of horns up to her shoulders, with small short section hanging in between them. rest of her hair is pulled up into a messy bun. she is donned in an outfit composed of black feathers with small brass framing on the chest -- she has huge breast barely held up by this raggedy outfit. she's looking at the camera with piercing gaze of white yes, licking red substance - assumed to be blood - of her cheek. there is stark contrast between the white and black, but the edges of her body are glowing in green, breaking into twisted, corrupted green flames on the side. in right upper corner, a fragment of a screenshot showing the same character in-game.

artwork of deathly pale young woman sitting with her legs pulled up to her chest on a night of full moon. 
she's wrapping one arm around her legs nearly touching her foot, the other one rests at the knees and touches her own cheek. her arms are surrounded by swirls of what we can assume is dark magic. her nails painted black. her dark purple hair is flowing down her back with big voluminous curves. she has some ornamental gold jewelry, including ankle bracelet, many rings and signets, upside-down lotus earring and gothic collar.
she's wearing a near see-through ragged black night gown ripped at the shoulder closer to the camera, exposing whole arm. the ripped piece is tied right above her elbow to reduce blood flow. her arm has deep intricately patterned wounds slowly seeping out blood, there are small purple gemstones stuck in some of the wounds, dull and bloody. the whole area around the wounds is scratched, looking hot and itchy- she's crying in pain yet sits still, waiting.

chibi heads of three characters: 
1. a cat-like demon character with electric blue hair and pale skin. her left eye is dark blue in color, right - dark grey with black sclera. she's laughing. 
2. a pale elf with very long ears. she has long pink hair pulled to the back and braided on the side and pink eyes. she's looking at camera with neutral expression, peeking above pair of glasses. 
3. a dark elf with white patch of hair in the middle of his head slicked back, and goatee, and red eyes. right side of his face is covered in pinkish scars. he has annoyed expression. gold piercings are shown on his ears.
